title: Responsive mode call: 2025 SciSpacE support
body: "The UK Space Agency is making funding available to support the preparation of experiments. This scheme is open to academics from the UK or overseas, working at UK Research Organisations, who have already been selected by ESA for access to microgravity or space environments facilities e.g., via their SciSpacE programme.  If you have secured access to an ESA microgravity/space environment facility through any other ESA schemes, please get in touch before submitting an application. "
